description_long: This is a sealed package of Fry's Family Foods Mixed Vegetables, featuring a predominantly white and green color scheme. The front of the package displays a large green label with white and orange text, listing the contents as carrots, garden peas, sweet corn, and green beans. A photographic image of the mixed vegetables in a white bowl is prominently shown, surrounded by images of fresh vegetables. The packaging appears to be made of flexible plastic, typical for frozen or pre-packaged vegetables, and is rectangular with slightly rounded edges. The back and sides of the package are less detailed, with the main focus on the front branding and product information. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and designed to attract attention in a retail or urban food context.
description: A sealed, rectangular plastic bag of Fry's Family Foods Mixed Vegetables with a green and white label and images of vegetables on the front. The package is visually appealing and designed for retail display.
description_view_0: The front view shows the full product branding, green label, and images of mixed vegetables in a bowl, with clear text and vibrant colors.
description_view_1: The left side view reveals the thickness of the package and a partial view of the front label, with the side edges visible.
description_view_2: The top view shows the sealed edge and a foreshortened look at the front label, with less detail visible.
description_view_3: The right side view is similar to the left, showing the package's thickness and a partial view of the front label and vegetable images.
attribute_brand_logo: A Fry's Family Foods logo is visible at the top left of the front label, featuring red and white colors with a stylized design.
attribute_flavor_indication: The front label and images indicate the flavor as mixed vegetables, specifically carrots, garden peas, sweet corn, and green beans.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional information and ingredients are visible on the front label in small white text below the product name.
